content.full_text:
October 17, 1990

Ms. Lynda Cassidy
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Linda:

This will confirm our telephone conversation on October 16, 1990. You advised me that if two committees share the costs of one television advertisement and pay the vendor directly, then no in-kind contributions are involved from one committee to the other. These payments would be reported as expenditures by each committee on their respective campaign statements.

Thank you for this advice.

Sincerely,

Peter A. Bagatelos

PAB/mlq
admin:10-17lc
